system.description:
Bound Servitor is the Conjurer discipline for runners who chose depth over breadth. Instead of cycling through summoned entities, they cultivate a relationship with a single bound thing across years, refining the contract, learning its preferences, accepting its quiet judgment. The bond is something between possession, partnership, and an open negotiation that never quite resolves.

On the job, the Bound Servitor Conjurer never quite shows up alone. Their entry feature is Constant Bond: their bound entity travels with them in a quiescent state and may be manifested as a free action at the start of any encounter, retaining levels of capability and memory between sessions.
system.grants: Constant Bond: persistent bound entity manifests free at encounter start; advances with the Conjurer.

wizard.tagline: Walk with the thing that has agreed to walk with you
